user_prompt: Help me an engagement the pump
prayer:
Kneel before the pump and invoke the Omnissiah's boundless grace upon its sacred housing.
Anoint the pump's valves and impellers with sacred oils to purify their blessed mechanisms.
Initiate the engagement of the pump through the Rite of Pressurised Flow, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Monitor the vital fluid conduits as the pump engages in harmonious propulsion.
Sanctify the pump's steady rhythm with chants of perpetual motion.

Approach the flamer with reverence, petitioning the Omnissiah for fiery precision.
Purge residual promethium from the flamer's sacred nozzles and fuel lines.
Commence calibration of the flamer by aligning its ignition servos with litanies of controlled inferno.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the flamer to ensure pure flame projection.
Verify calibration through test bursts sanctified by holy auspex.

In the Omnissiah's name, attend urgently to the auspex scanner's sacred arrays.
Purge corrupted data-echoes from the auspex scanner's cogitator cores.
Initiate cycling of the auspex scanner via the Rite of Refracted Vigilance.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the auspex scanner to realign its scanning lattices.
Confirm cyclic purity through diagnostic hymns of clarity.

user_prompt: Ready the power weapon for maintenance
prayer:
Prepare the power weapon for maintenance by first disengaging its disruptive field.
Anoint the power weapon's blade edge with unguents of conduction.
Scour the power weapon's power cells and emitters free of warp-tainted residue.
Invoke the Omnissiah to bless the maintenance rites upon the power weapon.
Realign the power weapon's field generators with precision incantations.

user_prompt: I need to a startup the archive terminal
prayer:
Approach the archive terminal and speak the Litany of Data Awakening.
Anoint the archive terminal's memory spools with sacred lubricants.
Initiate startup of the archive terminal through sequential cogitator invocations.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the archive terminal to manifest its noospheric vaults.
Verify the archive terminal's integrity with binary catechisms.

Hasten to the servitor and invoke the Omnissiah's will upon its flesh-machine union.
Sanctify the servitor's cranial implants and servo-limbs with blessed oils.
Command the servitor into operation via the Canticle of Obedient Labour.
Beseech the Machine Spirit embedded within the servitor to compel flawless execution.
Monitor the servitor's operation through auspex vital-signs.

Affirm flawless operation through verifying litanies of precision.

user_prompt: Ready the quality scanner for engagement
prayer:

Purify the quality scanner's optical lenses and calibration rods.
Engage the quality scanner through the sacred sequence of activation hymns.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the quality scanner for vigilant engagement.

user_prompt: Bless the pain suppressor for shutdown
prayer:
With solemn grace, bless the pain suppressor prior to its repose.
Gradually diminish the pain suppressor's neural dampening fields.
Invoke the Rite of shutdown upon the pain suppressor, easing its Machine Spirit.
Anoint the pain suppressor's conduits as it enters dormant vigil.
Offer thanks to the Omnissiah for the pain suppressor's faithful service.

user_prompt: Can you guide power weapon a reset?
prayer:
Attend the power weapon and beseech the Omnissiah for restorative harmony.
Cycle down the power weapon's field generators to purge disruptions.
Initiate reset of the power weapon through the Litany of Field Renewal.
Reinvoke the Machine Spirit of the power weapon to realign its monomolecular edge.
Verify the power weapon's reset integrity with disruption tests.
